title: Add Subjects List Section

requirements.text: Add a 'Subjects' section to the website that displays a list of subjects taught at the 10th Science Academy. Each subject should be displayed as a card or list item with the subject name clearly visible. The section should use the academy's red (#d9002c) accent color and match the existing visual theme (light gray background, centered layout, consistent typography).
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Subjects' section is visible on the page below the existing welcome/hero section.
The section displays a list of common 10th-grade science subjects (e.g., Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Mathematics, English, Social Studies).
Each subject is presented as a styled card or list item.
The section heading and interactive elements use the academy red (#d9002c) consistent with the existing theme.
The layout is centered and responsive, matching the overall page style.

constraints: Do not alter the existing header, welcome section, or visual theme implementations.
All styling must remain consistent with the academy's red (#d9002c) accent color and existing Tailwind/CSS design tokens.
No backend changes are required for this static content.
nonGoals: Settings or configuration section — deferred to a later request.
Dynamic subject data stored in or fetched from the backend.
